name: Pricing-and-Quotes-V1.docx
content:
How do I get a price or quote for a C.E. King machine?

C.E. King provides custom quotations for all machines. Prices vary based on specification, configuration, and destination country. To request a quote, contact the sales team directly or use the website chat.

Details

  • Email sales@ceking.com with your requirements
  • Include: product name, intended application, production volume, and delivery country
  • The team aims to respond within one business day
  • Popular quote requests include: King Dispenser RX, Technocount T8, Technocount T12, Technofill F1, Technofill F2, and King Cappers
  • Pricing is not listed on the website as machines are configured to order

Link: https://www.ceking.com/pages/contact
